caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall and Moderate Winds Impact Turks and Caicos
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 21 knots with wave heights reaching 5.3 feet and a swell period of 7 seconds. The area faces an 89% rain probability, indicating widespread heavy rainfall, while St. Maarten reports slightly stronger winds at 22 knots but lower rain probability.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Seas Impact Haifa Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing heavy rain with 100% rain probability alongside moderate seas reaching 6.2 feet and winds up to 14 knots from the west-northwest. Mykonos is seeing stronger winds at 21 knots but lower rain probability, creating challenging conditions in the eastern Mediterranean.
